$schema.description: JSON schema reference for editor tooling and validation

projects.description: All configured projects, keyed by project name

root.description: Optional base directory for apps in this project, relative to the config file

apps.description: Apps managed under this project, keyed by app name

command.description: Command used to start the app, e.g. "bun run dev"

cwd.description: Optional working directory for the app, relative to the project root
